phase_outcomes.P1: @urtela/pm-responder skeleton (poll open escalations, claim via acknowledge; enabled default FALSE; no-recursion seed). 25 tests. 77fa02e.
phase_outcomes.P2: createClaudeResponderRunner (resolver-runner transplant; 4-state sentinel answered{answer}|needs_human|give_up|error; killTree budget; stale-sentinel rm; answer-only prompt) + buildResponderPrompt/DEFAULT_RESPONDER_PROMPT. 37 tests. Not loop-wired. d3f2ec9.

notes: P3 wires the loop: claimed escalation -> spawn runner -> on answered post via answer/addMessage (acknowledged->answered); the answer becomes an undelivered directed reply (C2 closes the loop). P4 routes needs_human/give_up/error -> escalateToHuman.
